narrative:
Lake County has 161,194 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.3% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.3% D−R vs -6.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
